(def highs (pagerduty_incidents {:status "triggered" :urgency "high"}))
(if (empty? highs)
  (do
    (insert! :slack_messages {:channel "incidents" :text "All clear."})
    {:action "slack-all-clear" :count 0})
  (let [ids (map :id highs)
        body (str "Triggered high-urgency incidents:\n" (join "\n" ids))]
    (insert! :emails {:to_addr "oncall@acme.io" :su…(+97)
